_comment: Source: Screenshot_20260430-225045.png. Japanese UI. The 'japan' OCR engine drops the '[' / ']' on bracketed trap headers, so we use two fallbacks: (a) `_HEADERLESS_TRAP_RE` matches `同盟罠N` without brackets to recover the trap number, and (b) `_PERSONAL_REWARDS_RE` recognises the personal-rewards marker phrase so summary screens still suppress fake rows even when no ']' is found.
